c.d: The app's ability to organize notes into notebooks, folders, tags, or other structured systems for easy retrieval.
The effectiveness of the app's search feature in locating specific notes or content within notes, including keyword search and handwriting recognition.
Seamless syncing of notes across multiple devices (desktop, mobile, web) and operating systems.
Availability of features such as bold, italics, headings, lists, and code blocks to format notes effectively.
The ability to embed images, audio recordings, videos, and other media within notes.
Tools for sharing notes, collaborating with others in real-time, and managing permissions.
The ability to access and edit notes even without an internet connection.
Support for handwritten notes using styluses or touch input, with features like handwriting recognition and conversion to text.
The cost of the app, including whether it offers a free version or requires a subscription.
The aesthetic appeal, ease of navigation, and overall user-friendliness of the app's interface.
